name: Welcome to Cozy Create
landing_text: $(bold)Well Hello There.$()$(br2)If you're reading this, then that means I was thinking of you while making this mod pack. Don't worry about taking it all in at once. This book points at what's new and tells you which key opens the deeper stuff.$(br2)Poke around. That's the whole point.$(br2)Have fun out there.$(br)~Wesley
